PROBATION UPDATED PER AB 1950

/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/NP/X: DEFENSE COUNSEL AND COUNSEL FOR THEPEOPLE HAVE ENTERED INTO A STIPULATION AS TO RESTITUTION OWED TO THE VICTIM IN THIS CASE, PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION, RESTITUTION IS TO BE SET AT $950,00 PAYABLE TO THE VICTIM 'ROGERS STREET HOA'   PLUS 10% INTEREST PER YEAR (PC '1202,4(F)(3)(G)), AND AN ADMINISTRATIVE FEE OF UP TO 15% (PC '1203,1(1)) AND $1,498,49 PAYABLE TO THE VICTIM HARLAN DANNENBERG   PLUS 10% INTEREST PER YEAR (PC '1202,4(F)(3)(G)), AND AN ADMINISTRATIVE FEE OF UP TO 15%(PC '1203,1(1))/X: THE COURT ORDERS THE DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION IN THE STIPULATED AMOUNT,/X: CR-110 AND CR-111 SIGNED AND FILED/ OR /X: CR-110AND CR-111 NOT PRESENT AT TODAY'S COURT APPEARANCE FOR SIGNING AND FILING//X: DEFENDANT REFERRED TO ROOM 101 TO PAY RESTITUTION THROUGH THE COURT'S COLLECTION UNIT/CCU/CONTPROB/

/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/CONTD APD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:04-19-21/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DAWF/

913/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 1 Y:PJ 2 D/CTS: 2/WS/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/SUSFF/CTORD:THE ONLY FINES & FES NOT PERMANATLYSTAYED ARE THE PROBATION REVOCATION FINE AND ANY VICTIM RESTITUTION OWED/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/SA2:57 - 59 ROGER ST, & 1400 HOWARD ST, BOTH IN SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/EMTERM/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:01-21-21/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DAWF/

/CAL: I & A, P & C/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BYTHE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BYTHE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THENEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: TO TRAIL 20010148/DO
